candidate_definition_hints.text: Numo::TinyLinalg is a subset library from Numo::Linalg consisting only of methods used in Machine Learning algorithms.
**This project is discontinued. Development has been moved to [Numo::Linalg Alternative](https://github.com/yoshoku/numo-linalg-alt).**
